data.body: Create src/bin/openrouter-agent.ts — standalone Bun/Node script that accepts Claude-compatible CLI args (-p, --model, --output-format stream-json), reads OPENROUTER_API_KEY from env, calls OpenRouter chat completions API with SSE streaming, translates to Claude stream-json events on stdout. Add bin entry to package.json.
data.title: OpenRouter agent shim script
